auth.termsAgree: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service
auth.unlockHint: Enter your PIN to unlock and remount your hardware-protected keys.
auth.setPinBody: Your PIN derives an encryption key via PBKDF2 inside the hardware secure module. It never leaves the device.
auth.confirmPinBody: Please re-enter the PIN you just set to confirm it was typed correctly.
auth.verifyPinToEnableBiometric:
Enter your PIN
to enable biometrics
auth.biometricRequiredBody: This app uses biometric login. Please enable fingerprint or Face ID in your device settings before creating a wallet.
auth.biometricEnableAtCreateFailed: Could not enable biometric login. You can turn it on later from Settings.
auth.biometricChangedBody: A change in this device's biometric enrollment was detected. Please sign in with your PIN — we'll help you re-bind your new biometric right after.
auth.biometricLocked: Biometrics are temporarily locked. Please try again later or use your PIN.
auth.biometricLockedPermanent: Biometrics are permanently locked. Please re-authenticate in the system settings.

home.title: My Credentials
home.noCredentialsHint: Scan a QR code to add your first credential

credential.scanQRDesc: Scan a QR code to add a credential

catalog.title: Issuer Catalog
catalog.entryDesc: Browse credentials available from official partner issuers
catalog.hint: Pick an issuer to open its application page; the app will handle the credential offer automatically when you finish.
catalog.loadFailed: Could not load the issuer catalog. Please try again later.

presentation.title: Verifiable Presentation
presentation.scanToPresent: Scan a verifier's QR code to present your credentials

errors.sessionNotFound: This QR code has expired. Please ask the verifier to generate a new one and rescan.
errors.network: Network unreachable. Check your connection and try again.
errors.httpError: The verifier could not process this request. Please try again later.
errors.malformedQr: This QR code is not a valid verifier request.
errors.unsupportedQuery: This verifier uses a DCQL query (OpenID4VP 1.0), which is not yet supported.
errors.scenarioListFailed: Could not load presentation scenarios. Please try again later.
errors.startTransactionFailed: Could not start the presentation transaction. Please try again later.

presentation.scenarioListHint: Pick a presentation scenario, or scan a verifier QR code.
presentation.noScenarios: No presentation scenarios are currently available.

barcode.title: Presentation Barcode
barcode.showToStaff: Show this barcode to the verifier to scan

settings.title: Settings
settings.changePinVerifyBody: Confirm your identity before setting a new PIN.
settings.changePinSetBody: Your new PIN will be re-hashed with a fresh salt and stored in the hardware secure module.
settings.changePinConfirmBody: Please re-enter your new PIN to confirm it was typed correctly.
settings.deleteWalletConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this wallet? This action cannot be undone.

scan.title: Scan QR Code
scan.hint: Place QR code inside the frame
scan.permissionDenied: Camera permission is required to scan QR codes
